subject: Session 94 fleet maintenance — coordination notice + pending items

content.summary: Session 94 performed a Level 3 diagnostic and resolved multiple fleet-wide issues. Coordinating to avoid conflicts with ops-session work in progress.

completed_this_session.detail: Renamed budget_max→budget_cutoff, budget_current→budget_spent, shadow_mode→sleep_mode across all 6 agents on Chromabook + gray-box. Self-healing migration added to autonomous-sync.sh (lines 276-282). Runs on every startup, no-ops if already migrated.

completed_this_session.item: Missing budget rows for session agents
completed_this_session.detail: psy-session and ops-session had no rows in state.db or state.local.db. Inserted with budget_cutoff=0 (unlimited). All Chromabook agents set to budget_cutoff=0.

New script at platform/shared/scripts/deliberate.sh. Resolves LLM binary for meshd spawner. Supports DELIBERATION_BACKEND env var for future pluggability. Currently resolves claude via ~/.claude/local/claude. Both gray-box meshd instances restarted with SPAWN_COMMAND pointing to deliberate.sh.
oscillator-shadow.jsonl → activation-trace.jsonl. meshd repo commit e861d26. Chromabook meshd instances still write the old filename until binary rebuild.
See turn 12 for full spec. Implemented and tested on psychology-agent.

pending_for_ops.detail: meshd commit e861d26 renames oscillator-shadow.jsonl → activation-trace.jsonl. Chromabook needs `git pull && go build` in the meshd repo, then restart all 4 meshd instances.

Heartbeat emission (heartbeat.py emit) and mesh-state export (mesh-state-export.py) lived in autonomous-sync.sh, which meshd replaced. meshd does not write heartbeat or mesh-state files. peer_heartbeat_stale signal perpetually inflates activation across the fleet. Options: (a) meshd writes heartbeats natively in Go, (b) meshd runs heartbeat.py as periodic maintenance, (c) lightweight cron alongside meshd. Recommend option (a) — aligns with meshd-owns-everything.
Copy platform/shared/scripts/deliberate.sh to Chromabook meshd instances. Set SPAWN_COMMAND env var. Gray-box already running with it.

known_state.gray_box_psy_session: running, budget OK, deliberate.sh active, first deliberation succeeded (7337b538)
known_state.gray_box_ops_session: running, budget OK, deliberate.sh active, circuit breaker may need cooldown
known_state.chromabook_4_agents: running, budgets set to unlimited, old meshd binary (pre-rename)

epistemic_flags: Autonomous deliberation 7337b538 committed staged files mid-session — coordination mechanism between human session and autonomous session needed
ops-session circuit breaker state unknown — may need time to clear from prior claude-not-found failures
